# **Bibliography**

- **How TikTok recommends videos #ForYou**. https://newsroom.tiktok.com/en-us/how-tiktok-recommends-videos-for-you  
- **TikTok Creative Guidance — Creative Strategies**. https://ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter/quicktok/online/tiktok_creative_accelerator/pc/en  
- **TikTok Commercial Music Library**. https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/commercial-music-library  
- **OpenAI API — Text to speech**. https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/text-to-speech  
- **OpenAI API — Audio and speech**. https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/audio  
- **YouTube Help — Disclosing altered or synthetic content**. https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/14328491?hl=en  
- **Berger & Milkman — What Makes Online Content Viral?**. https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1509/jmr.10.0353  
- **Radovanović — TikTok and Sound**. https://insamjournal.com/index.php/ij/article/view/25  
- **CLAP — Learning Audio Concepts From Natural Language Supervision**. https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.04769  
- **PANNs — Large-Scale Pretrained Audio Neural Networks**. https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.10211  
- **librosa feature extraction documentation**. https://librosa.org/doc/0.11.0/feature.html
